'''Shinba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]].

She married successful businessman [[Kelko]] and had two children with him. It is believed that they met only after Kelko discovered his family fortune.

It is known that, when Kelko wanted to have an excursion in his ship, ''[[Dindoo's Glory]]'', he always took his old, trusty droid [[WED00-88]], instead of his family.

{{Char-stub}}
